title: Mighty Meaty Croatian Meat Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring ground meats and coconut cream, perfect for a crowd. This dish is low in glycemic index and rich in flavor.
instructions: Brown the ground beef and ground pork in a large pot over medium high heat, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the dried thyme and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 1 hour.
Stir in the coconut cream and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
